entity.description: One of David’s warriors (2 Sam. 23:38), an Ithrite.

nodes.label: Gareb
nodes.description: One of David’s warriors (2 Sam. 23:38), an Ithrite.

verses.text: Ira an Ithrite, Gareb an Ithrite,
Ira the Ithrite, Gareb the Ithrite,
And the measuring line shall yet go forth over against it upon the hill Gareb, and shall compass about to Goath.
